completion_summary: Upgraded layered evaluation to 0.3 with replay-bound interaction capability strata, observed adaptation-source evidence, official runner no-assistance provenance, and external model/training resource ledgers. Objective/primary/risk/cost/validity semantics remain unchanged; interaction and resource axes are explicitly non-scalarized and cross-stratum comparisons cannot support algorithm-only claims. Identifiability audit passes controls but correctly remains blocked on fresh all-method risk-policy reruns. 18 tests plus Ruff and mypy pass.
notes: Preserve objective and primary semantics; new interaction/resource diagnostics are replay-bound and explicitly non-scalarized.
scope: Upgrade replay-bound layered evaluation with interaction capability strata, observed adaptation evidence, harness-assistance provenance, endpoint completion, and external method resource accounting without scalarizing incomparable axes
